commands.review_summary:
The PR adds user-only transcript persistence before CLI/ACP attempts can fail, routes internal session-effects writes to the active internal transcript, and skips duplicate user rows after successful persistence.

PR surface: Source +121, Tests +457. Total +578 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still has an ACP runTurn failure path that rethrows before persistAcpTurnTranscript, and the linked issue supplies concrete JSONL loss evidence; this review did not run live ACP or Telegram.
